description:
Import the external Git repository https://github.com/octocat/Hello-World.git into the TailwindTraders project in Azure DevOps as a new repository named 'LegacyPrototype'. Standardize the branching by creating a 'main' branch from the existing 'master' branch and setting 'main' as the default branch for the repository.

Login credentials (if prompted):
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!
